programmes.show_description: Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage (2018).
Crime thriller starring Sydney Sweeney. A couple's long-lost daughter mysteriously reconnects with them. But after she moves into their home, suspicions arise around her true identity. (2018)
Pilot - Part 2: Sue's first undercover surveillance operation exposes an organised crime ring. Meanwhile, Myles Leland airs his feelings about Sue's temporary placement in the team.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Murders: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. The antiques expert and amateur sleuth is drawn into another murder mystery when she finds a body in a storage locker. (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Murders: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. The antiques expert and amateur sleuth is drawn into another murder mystery when she finds a body in a storage locker. (2018)
Pilot: Carrie Wells is a former homicide detective with an impeccable memory. The murder of a neighbour reunites Carrie with her former partner who tries to convince her to join the NYPD.
After Castle and Beckett finally tie the knot, the newlyweds go undercover on a murder case at an Old West-style resort and soon 'strike gold' uncovering secrets of the town's past.
...Sentence: Whodunnit with Kellie Martin and Lauren Holly. When a man she jailed is killed, fingers point at District Attorney Paulina D'Orazio. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Sentence: Whodunnit with Kellie Martin and Lauren Holly. When a man she jailed is killed, fingers point at District Attorney Paulina D'Orazio. (2019)
Murder by Friendly Fire: Dr Sloan investigates when Steve's colleague is killed during an LAPD undercover assignment.
Murder Can Be Contagious: Jesse and Dr Sloan are placed in quarantine after catching a deadly strain of smallpox from a man rescued on the beach. Can Steve and Amanda help find an antidote?
A Nest Of Vipers: Jessica researches her latest book at a Californian zoo. Can she determine whether a deadly snake bite was an unfortunate incident or a meticulously planned murder?
Amsterdam Kill: Jessica investigates the disappearance of her friend during a trip to Amsterdam. Can she find her friend and a murderer?
Bombs Away: Sue returns from agent training to investigate a bomb threat at an oil refinery. Will Sue and Jack be able to prove the legitimacy of the threat in time?
Kill Switch: Castle and Beckett experience severe delays in an investigation when Esposito follows a suspect onto a subway car and is held hostage with lots of petrified passengers.
Heroes: Carrie uses her own childhood experiences to help her connect with the only person to witness the murder of a married couple, their seven-year-old son.
...Real Murders: Crime mystery starring Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. Librarian crime buff Aurora is dragged into a terrifying game when a copycat killer targets the Real Murders Club. (2015)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Murder mystery with singer Jewel. Renovation takes a deadly twist when the body of a local banker is found in an old Victorian building Shannon is working on. It's time for some DIY sleuthing! (2018)

A disgraced flight crash investigator secretly investigates the plane crash which killed her brother. Starring Kerry Condon. (2016)

X Marks the Murder: Part 1: Dr Sloan is drawn into an investigation when he is contacted by a serial murderer known as the Casanova Killer. Part 1 of 2.
X Marks the Murder: Are Dr Sloan and Steve hunting for a copycat killer after a key suspect in the case is found dead? The investigation becomes personal when Amanda is attacked. Part 2 of 2.
To Kill A Legend: Will a letter, allegedly written by George Washington, damage the reputation of a Cabot Cove icon and lead to the murder of a documentary filmmaker?
Death In Hawaii: Jessica travels to Hawaii for a relaxing break but is soon drawn into an investigation surrounding the disappearance of her friend's son.
Assassins: Sue and her colleagues are assigned to stop a team of mercenaries hired to assassinate a visiting official dignitary.
Last Action Hero: Castle and Beckett investigate the mysterious murder of Castle's favourite 1980s action movie icon and recruit a ragtag group of aging action hero stars to help.
Check Out Time: Carrie decides to investigate the murder of a hotel guest. But can she prove whether the murder is linked to the attempted rape of a hotel maid?
...Three Bedrooms, One Corpse: Part-time sleuth Aurora pitches in to help her mother show houses, only to walk into another life-or-death situation... (2016)
